projectDescription: A local-first web app for tracking and managing recurring subscriptions, with optional cloud sync, renewal reminders, analytics, and a developer API.
keyFeatures: Local-first subscription tracking — no account required
Multi-currency support with live exchange rates (CNY, USD, EUR, JPY, GBP, AUD, CAD, CHF, HKD, SGD)
Spending analytics with category breakdowns and renewal patterns
Optional Supabase cloud sync and multi-device access
Bark push notifications for upcoming renewal reminders
Import and export subscription data as JSON
Light and dark mode on desktop and mobile
Premium tier with higher API quotas and more API keys
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/subscriptions — list all subscriptions for the authenticated API key owner
Authorization: Bearer subm_xxx — API key authentication header
X-RateLimit-Limit / X-RateLimit-Remaining / X-RateLimit-Reset — rate-limit response headers
Subscription fields: name, category, amount, currency, period, lastPaymentDate, customDate, notificationEnabled
